title: Security Audit and Hardening
description: Perform security review of the entire application. Audit: IPC command validation, SQL injection prevention, XSS in rendered markdown, subprocess command injection, file path traversal, secure storage of settings. Implement CSP headers for webview. Document security model.
acceptance_criteria: All Tauri IPC commands validate and sanitize inputs
SQL queries use parameterized statements exclusively
Markdown renderer configured to sanitize HTML
Subprocess spawning validates command against allowlist
File operations validate paths prevent traversal
CSP configured in Tauri to prevent inline scripts
Sensitive data (if any) stored in OS keychain via tauri-plugin-store
SECURITY.md documents threat model and mitigations
No critical or high findings from automated SAST scan
agent_output: SECURITY.md with process isolation, input validation, IPC security, WebSocket security, database security, frontend security. Includes Tauri capability config and production recommendations.
